result:
Implemented a stdlib-only `serve` command that exposes the notebook as a local web UI. The CLI now accepts `serve [--addr host:port]`, builds a notebook snapshot from the existing Markdown files, and serves an index plus note pages with rendered Markdown, clickable `[[note-id]]` links, backlinks, tag filtering, archived-note toggle, and broken-link warnings in both the note body and sidebar summary. The main changes are in [main.go](/home/changkun/null-codex/main.go).

I also added handler/rendering tests in [main_test.go](/home/changkun/null-codex/main_test.go) and documented the new command in [README.md](/home/changkun/null-codex/README.md). I could not run `go test` here because the environment does not have the `go` tool installed (`go: command not found`).
